name: replit-n8n-catsluvus-backlink-builder
description: Standalone SEO Backlink Builder - Automated backlink generation across 3,000+ web directories & Whois sites

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx tsx watch index.ts
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
